---
title: "Aidan Mistry"
image: images/aidan_profile_photo.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aidan-mistry-56832b2a0/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AMistry176
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:aidanmistry17@gmail.com

---

## Welcome to my Portfolio

I am a fourth-year student specialising in data analysis. This site showcases my professional journey, academic projects, and technical skills.

Feel free to explore some of my college assignments in the **[Projects](projects/index.qmd)** tab or view my formal experience in the **[CV](amistry_cv.pdf)** section.
